text:

now live on YouTube. link in bio.

visual.openai_prompt: Create a cinematic lo-fi anime-inspired Afrofuturist coding studio scene for Layer8Culture Radio (not photorealistic). A Black creator is seated FROM BEHIND at a premium coding workstation, calm and focused, wearing a black hoodie with a large number 8 on the back (no face reveal). Multiple monitors show code and a subtle line graph; a laptop with code; a warm desk lamp dimmed low; a coffee/tea mug with steam; plants and hanging vines; books on system design, clean code, and algorithms; West African-inspired pottery and design objects; a warm wood desk; and a blank blue neon sign panel on the wall (an unlit, lettering-free glowing panel — do NOT render any text or letters; branding is composited in afterward). Through a large window is a futuristic African city skyline with a few slow flying vehicles and a deep starlit night sky, the city settling into stillness — deep midnight navy tones, neon cyan reflections on glass, a distant amber glow on the horizon. The mood is profoundly calm, still, and restful — the day's work is winding down into deep quiet. Afrofuturist city view, Black coder or student seated from behind, warm desk lamp, calm study atmosphere, loopable visual, gentle motion potential, culturally intentional objects, futuristic but grounded, balanced electric-blue and warm gold lighting. Leave the lower third as clean, uncluttered negative space for composited headline typography. Avoid generic startup office, bright corporate lighting, cheap gamer RGB, cluttered composition, cartoon props, excessive sci-fi armor, robots, fake hologram overload, random neon colors, copyrighted franchise references, garbled screen text, random figurines, tripod-mounted monitors, makeshift setups, rendered text, signage lettering, and garbled typography. avoid photorealism, empty minimal rooms, sparse composition

reel.sora_prompt: A calm cinematic Afrofuturist lo-fi anime studio at sunrise. The Black creator seated from behind at their workstation barely moves — a slow, unhurried camera push forward as warm amber and gold morning light drifts through the large window, steam rising softly from a mug on the desk, plants swaying almost imperceptibly, the futuristic African city beyond the glass waking slowly in the early light. Electric blue monitors cast a gentle cool glow that contrasts with the golden warmth. The motion is dreamlike, loopable, and unhurried. Clean output — no on-screen text.
